overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a historic New Orleans-style city street with cobblestones and wrought-iron balconies, then entering a building through a dark passage into a sunlit interior courtyard with a central fountain.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city sidewalk with covered walkway and storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk past various storefronts and NPCs

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking ahead on the sidewalk
horse-drawn carriage moving along the cobblestone street

entered.detail: two-story historic building with green shutters and wrought iron balcony
covered sidewalk with wooden columns and overhead balcony structure
tall leafy trees lining the historic street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk next to a red brick building with green shutters. A woman in a blue dress walks ahead, and a horse-drawn carriage moves along the street. The covered walkway provides partial shade from the bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street approaching building entrance

events.description: approaching the arched entrance to a building passage

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, approaching a dark entranceway between buildings

notable_agents.action: man in brown suit walking across the street

entered.detail: weathered gray stone building with arched doorways and wooden furniture outside
large metal barrel next to wooden crates

segments.scene_description: The character passes from the red brick building to a gray stone building with arched doorways. Wooden chairs and crates sit outside the entrance. A man in a suit crosses the street in the distance as the character approaches a dark passage entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark covered passage between buildings leading to courtyard

events.description: entering dark covered passage from bright sunlight, visibility drops significantly
approaching bright exit at end of passage, light increasing ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow dark passage toward a sunlit courtyard visible ahead

entered.detail: narrow brick corridor with arched ceiling leading through the building
large potted fern plant in the corner of the passage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, narrow brick passage that cuts through the building. The lighting shifts dramatically from bright sunlight to near darkness. A potted fern sits in the corner as the character walks toward a bright arched exit revealing a courtyard beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit interior courtyard with fountain and tropical plants

events.description: emerging from dark passage into bright interior courtyard with fountain

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard, observing the central fountain and surrounding balconies

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow dress standing near a table in the courtyard

entered.detail: three-tiered stone fountain with water in the center of the courtyard
white painted wooden balconies with lattice railings on upper floors of surrounding building
large potted palm plants arranged around the courtyard perimeter
white wooden staircase leading to the second floor balcony

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a beautiful sunlit interior courtyard featuring a central stone fountain surrounded by potted palms. The courtyard is enclosed by a three-story building with white wooden balconies and stairs. A woman stands near a table on the right as the character explores the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, sun-drenched city street through a dim corridor and into a secluded interior courtyard. It begins along a covered sidewalk beside a red brick building with green shutters, passing a woman in a blue dress and a horse-drawn carriage under the bright midday sun. As the character moves forward, the red brick gives way to a gray stone building with arched doorways and scattered crates before the camera turns into a dark, narrow brick passage. The lighting shifts dramatically from brilliant sunlight to near darkness within this corridor, passing a potted fern as the view opens toward a bright arched exit. Finally, the scene emerges into a luminous courtyard featuring a central stone fountain and potted palms, enclosed by a three-story building with white wooden balconies.
